# CoPilot Instructions for Simple Todo App

## Project Overview
This project is a simple todo list application built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No frameowrks or libraries are used.

## Project Structure
- `index.html`: Main HTML file with the app layout and theme toggle button.
- `styles.css`: All styling for the app, including light and dark themes.
- `app.js`: All JavaScript logic including todo CRUD operations and theme persistance using localStorage.

## Features
- Add,complte or delete todo items.
-Dark/light theme toggle.
-Theme preference persists using localStorage.

## Coding Guidelines
-Using vanilla JavaScript, no frameworks.
-Keep all styles in styles.css.
-Use localStorage for any data persistence.
-Follow exisitng naming conventions in the codebase.
-Keep code simple and readable.
